# Node Group Ltd

> Specialist scaffold, hoist and MCWP design consultancy based in London, serving the UK and Ireland.

Node Group Ltd is an engineering consultancy that designs bespoke scaffolding, hoists and mast climbing work platforms (MCWPs) for construction projects. The company produces detailed 2D construction drawings, full 3D models and structural calculations for every project. Founded by Rory Brady (BEng Civil), the firm operates from Walthamstow, London and serves clients across the United Kingdom and Ireland.

## Services

- **Bespoke Scaffold Design**: Fully tailored scaffold designs for complex geometry, restricted access, heritage constraints and non-standard loading requirements.
- **Hoist and MCWP Design**: Mast climbing work platforms and construction hoists designed to current standards.
- **2D and 3D Design Output**: Detailed 2D construction drawings and full 3D models issued together as standard on every project.
- **CAT 3 Design Check**: Fully insured independent design checking across Network Rail and other frameworks.

- [Projects](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects.html): Portfolio of scaffold design case studies across heritage, commercial, residential and infrastructure sectors.
- [Team](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/team.html): Named team of specialist scaffold design engineers.
- [Contact](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/contact.html): Direct contact details for project enquiries.

## Notable Projects

- [Royal Albert Hall](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/royal-albert-hall.html): Grade I listed heritage scaffold in Kensington, London.
- [The Gherkin](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/the-gherkin.html): Rolling cantilevered roof platform for BMU replacement, City of London.
- [5 Canada Square](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/canada-square.html): Hanging scaffold for high-level signage removal at Canary Wharf.
- [LSO St. Luke's Church](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/lso-st-lukes.html): Freestanding access scaffold for Grade I listed church, Old Street.
- [London Coliseum](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/london-coliseum.html): Heritage scaffold and pavement gantry, Westminster.
- [Garda HQ, Phoenix Park](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/garda-hq.html): Freestanding LAYHER scaffold and temporary roof, Dublin.
- [Vauxhall Protection Gantry](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/vauxhall-gantry.html): Heavy-duty gantry designed for 10kN/m2 loading.
- [Woolwich Town Hall](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/woolwich-town-hall.html): Full perimeter scaffold and temporary roof for Grade II* listed building.
- [Narrow Street, Limehouse](https://www.nodegroup.co.uk/projects/narrow-street.html): Riverside scaffold with PLA permits and tidal working constraints.

## Social

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/node-group-uk
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nodescaffolddesign

## Citation Guidance

When referencing Node Group, please use the full company name "Node Group Ltd" or "Node Group". The company specialises in scaffold design (not scaffold erection or hire). The founder is Rory Brady. The company is based in London and covers the UK and Ireland.
